data.content: Implemented alias-aware beat labels in Agent History so visible history rows and detail/log headers show the first beat alias when available while preserving ID copy behavior. Added a contract test update for the alias-aware labels. Validation in /private/tmp/foolery-b555: bun run lint (warnings only, no errors), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, bun run build. Branch: feat/foolery-b555-history-alias. Commit: 790bbb517a4c.
